Documentation.short_help: Generate tetrahedral volume mesh from a closed surface using TetGen.
Documentation.long_help: This filter takes a closed triangulated surface mesh (vtkPolyData) and generates a tetrahedral volume mesh (vtkUnstructuredGrid) that fills the interior. It uses the TetGen library for constrained Delaunay tetrahedralization. The input surface must be closed (watertight), manifold, and composed of triangles only.

IntVectorProperty.name: LimitMaxVolume
IntVectorProperty.label: Use max volume
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON, TetGen applies a maximum tetrahedron volume (-a) if Max volume is positive. Default OFF (no volume limit); turn ON and set Max volume to refine by tet size.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MaxVolume
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Max volume
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum tetrahedron volume passed to TetGen (-a). When Use max volume is ON, set a positive value; 0 or negative omits -a (same as TetGen without a volume bound). ParaView BoundsDomain ties the slider range to the input axis-aligned bounding box (updates when the boundary input changes); use Scale/Reset for a suggested magnitude.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MaxRadiusEdgeRatio
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Max Radius-Edge Ratio
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum radius-edge ratio for quality meshing (TetGen -q). Default 1.8. When > 0, must be >= 1.2. Set to 0 for no limit on radius ratio (but quality meshing still enabled if Min Dihedral Angle > 0).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MinDihedralAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Min Dihedral Angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum dihedral angle (degrees) for quality meshing (TetGen -q). Default 0 (no limit on dihedral angle). When > 0, enables quality mesh generation with this constraint. Set to 0 for no limit on dihedral angle.

IntVectorProperty.name: Nobisect
IntVectorProperty.label: Preserve Surface
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON, TetGen does not insert Steiner points on the boundary (-Y). The input surface mesh is preserved without modification. Incompatible with CDT.

IntVectorProperty.name: DoCheck
IntVectorProperty.label: Check Mesh
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Check consistency of the final mesh (-C).

IntVectorProperty.name: UseCDT
IntVectorProperty.label: Use CDT
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Use constrained Delaunay refinement (-D). Incompatible with Preserve Surface.

IntVectorProperty.name: CDTRefine
IntVectorProperty.label: CDT Refine Level
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CDT refinement scheme 1-7 (-D#). Only used when Use CDT is ON.
